title: phyllanthus boehmii var. boehmii
intro: Phyllanthus boehmii var. boehmii, also known as the Boehm's phyllanthus, is a plant species that belongs to the family Phyllanthaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiviral activities, and is used to treat various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections. The health benefits of Phyllanthus boehmii var. boehmii include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of extracts, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed orally or applied topically to the skin.
